name: Claremore Recreation Center
description: Claremore Recreation Center is the most popular place to play pickleball in Claremore, OK. There are 8 indoor, surfaced courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. It is $35 per month for a Member Pickleball Pass; Two hours of play for nonmember is $5; Three hours of play for nonmember is $7; Four hours of play for nonmember is $10. Players have access to restrooms, showers, water, and locker rooms.
fees: Fee required — $5 per player, Monthly Memberships Also Offered

name: K2C Gym
description: K2C Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Catoosa, OK. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Powers Park
description: Come play pickleball at Powers Park in Claremore, OK! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
